title: Add telemetry field to AgentRunResult and capture metrics in runners
description: Add optional telemetry dict field to AgentRunResult in models.py (defaults to None for backward compat). In runner.py, instrument both runners: (1) measure wall-clock duration via time.monotonic() around subprocess calls, (2) measure prompt_chars and prompt_lines before calling subprocess, (3) in ClaudeCodeAgentRunner extract provider telemetry (cost_usd, duration_api_ms, num_turns, input/output tokens, cache stats, stop_reason, session_id, permission_denials) from the JSON response envelope before extracting structured_output, (4) in CodexAgentRunner populate minimal telemetry (duration_ms, prompt_chars, prompt_lines, source='measured'). Both runners must populate agent_result.telemetry before returning. Also capture raw prompt_text and response_text in the telemetry dict for artifact storage downstream.
acceptance_criteria: AgentRunResult has telemetry: dict[str, Any] | None = None field
ClaudeCodeAgentRunner populates telemetry with all provider fields from spec table
CodexAgentRunner populates telemetry with duration_ms, prompt_chars, prompt_lines, source='measured'
Wall-clock duration measured via time.monotonic() around subprocess.run()
prompt_chars and prompt_lines measured from prompt before subprocess call
Raw prompt_text and response_text captured in telemetry for artifact storage
